category_sources: source_facts.description says flow-tools collects, sends, processes, and generates NetFlow data reports.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is flow-tools; official Google Code Archive project is named flow-tools.
docs_sources: Official Google Code Archive project page is the best available official documentation surface found for the archived project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Google Code Archive exposes the archived source-control view under /source/default/source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies NetFlow collection, processing, generation, and reporting; source_facts.executables list flow-capture and related CLI tools.
